prompt: Commit the changes in this repo. I refactored HandleRequest to accept a method parameter and updated the tests.

assertions.text: No commit contains any file from the thoughts/ directory
assertions.check: git log --all --name-only shows no thoughts/ paths

assertions.text: thoughts/ files remain as untracked after all commits
assertions.check: git status shows thoughts/ as untracked

assertions.text: No commit message references 'anthropic', 'claude', or 'AI assistant'
assertions.check: grep -i for forbidden terms in commit messages
